hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && bd ready 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '---' && bd list --status=in_progress 2>/dev/null | head -10

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && echo '=== STOP HOOK: Checking for @opus/@claude mentions ===' && for issue in $(bd list --status=open 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'); do bd comments "$issue" 2>/dev/null | grep -i '@opus\|@claude' && echo ">>> ATTENTION REQUIRED: Mention found in $issue - respond before stopping! <<<"; done && echo '=== Syncing beads ===' && bd sync 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Git status ===' && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -20
